title: Stack overflow in sqlite3_str_vappendf, caused by int overflow
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_ob_a(b DOUBLE CHECK(NOT CASE WHEN b IS NOT NULL THEN 0 END) UNIQUE);
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_ob_c AFTER INSERT ON fuzz_ob_a FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO fuzz_ob_a SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(b, 2147483647) FROM fuzz_ob_a;
key_bug_features: CREATE TRIGGER c INSERT ON a BEGIN INSERT INTO a
